category.name: Spoofing
category.control: trust tier validation and signed endpoint allowlist

category.name: Tampering
category.control: hash manifest and CI integrity checks

category.name: Repudiation
category.control: immutable decision ledger with correlation IDs

category.name: ElevationOfPrivilege
category.threat: implicit tool approvals through prompt injection
category.control: policy engine precedence over model instructions
